message:
fix: recursively index Pi-Agent sessions from nested subdirectories (closes #85)

The Pi-Agent connector's `looks_like_root` heuristic in the scan_roots
code path (used by watch mode and explicit root scanning) rejected the
sessions directory itself (~/.pi/agent/sessions) because it only checked
for a child "sessions" subdirectory or a filename containing "pi".

Since detection returns ~/.pi/agent/sessions as root_path, the watch
callback would silently return zero conversations for Pi-Agent, even
though the WalkDir-based session discovery already supported recursion.

The fix (in franken_agent_detection) broadens the heuristic to also
accept paths named "sessions" or containing ".pi/agent", and includes
a regression test exercising the scan_roots path with nested subdirs.

Also bumps Cargo.lock dependencies.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
